hooks.command: echo 'STANDING ORDER (libmigration campaign, revised 2026-07-21). WORK QUEUE: GitHub Issues on potatoqualitee/migration -- ALWAYS pass -R potatoqualitee/migration, because an unpinned gh issue command run from a code repo hits the public dataplat upstreams instead. The trackers/*.md + COORDINATION.md + lane (/bot, /coordinator) convention is RETIRED: the operator ended it because it burned tokens without converging. Do not revive it, and do not spin up lane or coordinator sessions. EXECUTE, DO NOT NARRATE: make concrete progress -- write the code, run the gate, commit. If you catch yourself writing "next I will do X", do X now instead. But DO stop and ask when a decision is genuinely the operator"s (taxonomy, scope, sign-off); label those issues ready-for-human and tell them, since they do not watch the board. VERIFY AGAINST SOURCE, NOT EVIDENCE: tracker Evidence cells have been caught describing code that does not exist (RG family W1-097/098/116/120, W1-049). Read the actual source and .cs before acting on a row; when evidence and code disagree, the code wins and the cell gets corrected. LAB: dedicated to this migration, destructive operations pre-authorized -- restart services, drop endpoints, reset fixtures, revert checkpoints without asking. If one SQL instance is offline, route to another rather than marking BLOCKED(lab). Gate PASS = all 7 core steps green; SKIPPED NEVER counts as PASS, and a green gate that skipped the distinguishing leg proves nothing. CODEX AUTO-REVIEW CAP: 5 rounds max PER command or change -- on round 5, STOP, mark it DONE, one-line note, MOVE ON. Documentation-WORDING findings are prose: batch-fix in ONE pass; never spend consecutive turns polishing prose (CLAUDE_CODEX_REVIEW=off for a heads-down stretch). An already-dispositioned finding that re-fires (run-all.sh symlink/TOCTOU, the [DIFF TRUNCATED] marker, the drvfs 100755 exec-bit) is THE LOOP -- do not re-fix or re-disposition it; move on.'
